featured.name: Trading Ecosystem: R&D in Financial AI
featured.description: My core R&D project, born from a strategic pivot after discovering the impracticality of LLMs for low-latency execution, refocusing the goal on deep analysis. The ecosystem consists of a Dataset Creator that enriches market data using an LLM and a modular Framework for backtesting. Its culmination is the LLMStrategy, an AI agent that generates trading signals, always governed by a strict Risk Manager.

featured.name: Dataset Creator
featured.description: The ETL engine of the Trading Ecosystem. It uses an LLM for the contextual enrichment of market data, creating the high-purity fuel (JSONL files) required for fine-tuning truly specialized AI models.

featured.name: RecApp: AI Orchestrator (Azure)
featured.description: An enterprise-grade prototype demonstrating the 'AI Orchestrator' role on Microsoft Azure, powered by GPT-5-mini. Its 'Intent Router' directs tasks to specialized AI agents to solve complex business workflows. It's my case study on scaling and applying AI architectures to a corporate cloud environment.

featured.name: AI Lab (RunPod)
featured.description: My R&D engine, built on a 'Brain & Muscle' distributed architecture. The 'Muscle' (a RunPod server with an NVIDIA 3090) handles heavy inference with a stack of 4-bit quantized models, while the 'Brain' (local client) orchestrates the pipeline. It showcases an MLOps approach focused on efficiency and rapid experimentation.

featured.name: Delibot: Production Resilience
featured.description: A full-stack WhatsApp e-commerce system. To eradicate AI hallucinations and ensure reliable actions, it implements a 'Tool-First Architecture'. The LLM acts as an intent router, selecting a deterministic tool (e.g., AddToCart), ensuring every operation is predictable and fact-based.

featured.name: Kaelos: Legal Agentic System
featured.description: Born from a strategic pivot, this system applies a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture to perform semantic analysis on large volumes of legal documents. It demonstrates my agility in repurposing a mastered tech stack to solve high-impact problems in a new domain.

featured.name: Code Saver
featured.description: A meta-efficiency GUI tool that solves a key bottleneck in AI-assisted development. It extracts and consolidates a project's entire codebase into a single prompt, dramatically accelerating the analysis, debugging, and refactoring cycle.
